message:
Clear Dependabot alerts: bump transitive deps, update docs/ stack

GitHub remote flagged 34 vulnerabilities on push. Audit revealed two
scopes: 12 in the workspace lockfile (transitive via vitest/wrangler),
and the rest in docs/ (Astro Starlight site, separate npm-managed
project that GitHub also scans).

Workspace fixes (pnpm overrides in root package.json):
  vite      ≥8.0.5    (path-traversal in optimized-deps map handling)
  picomatch ≥4.0.4    (regex backtracking)
  postcss   ≥8.5.10   (XSS via unescaped </style> in stringify output)
  undici    ≥7.24.0   (header injection / mixed content)

Docs/ fixes:
  @astrojs/starlight 0.34 → 0.38.4
  astro              5.7  → 6.1.6
  Plus matching `overrides` field in docs/package.json so npm respects
  the same pinned transitives.
  Lockfile regenerated from scratch (delete + npm install).

Result: pnpm audit shows "No known vulnerabilities found"; npm audit
in docs/ shows "found 0 vulnerabilities".

All 147 workspace tests still pass (vite 8.x bump didn't break
vitest-pool-workers; verified with full `pnpm -r test`).
